# EduChain

> Educational blockchain platform for young learners. Part of the GEMBA IT ecosystem. Built on Ethereum Sepolia testnet — no real money at risk.

EduChain teaches Web3 through hands-on, safe blockchain interactions. Users mint NFTs, earn GAME tokens, and trade on a curated peer-to-peer marketplace. The platform is fully on-chain but runs on Sepolia, so students can deploy contracts and move value without any financial exposure.

## URLs

- Home: https://educhain.gembait.com/en
- Gallery (my NFTs): https://educhain.gembait.com/en/gallery
- Marketplace: https://educhain.gembait.com/en/marketplace
- Token Shop: https://educhain.gembait.com/en/shop
- ETH Faucet: https://educhain.gembait.com/en/faucet
- Leaderboard: https://educhain.gembait.com/en/leaderboard
- Full Rankings: https://educhain.gembait.com/en/rankings
- About: https://educhain.gembait.com/en/about
- Contact: https://educhain.gembait.com/en/contact

Languages: English (en), Bulgarian (bg), Spanish (es). Replace `/en` with `/bg` or `/es` on any URL above.

## Quick facts

- Network: Ethereum Sepolia testnet (chain ID 11155111)
- Tokens: GAME (ERC-20), EduChain NFTs (ERC-721)
- NFT types:
  - Predefined NFTs — fixed on-chain metadata, 0.01 ETH
  - Custom NFTs — user-supplied IPFS metadata, 0.03 ETH
- Custom NFTs also mintable in batches with 1 GAME token per NFT (no ETH required)
- ETH faucet: 0.05 ETH per whitelisted user every 24 hours
- Access control: whitelist-based (teachers/program admins onboard learners)
- Rate limits on marketplace purchases to prevent bot/spam activity

## Scoring (on-chain)

- 1 GAME token = 1 point
- 1 Predefined NFT = 10 points
- 1 Custom NFT = 30 points
- Points are computed on-chain by TrackingContract.getLeaderboard() — no off-chain database

## User journey

1. Get whitelisted (teacher/program admin adds the wallet)
2. Claim 0.05 ETH from the faucet
3. Buy GAME tokens with ETH in the Token Shop, or mint Predefined NFTs directly
4. Mint Custom NFTs (ETH or GAME-token batch)
5. List and trade NFTs and tokens on the Marketplace
6. Climb the Leaderboard as on-chain holdings grow

## Technology

- Frontend: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, i18next (en/bg/es)
- Web3: wagmi v3, viem 2, ethers 6
- Contracts: Solidity 0.8.x on Sepolia — Whitelist, GameToken (ERC-20), GameNFTPredefined (ERC-721), GameNFTCustom (ERC-721), TokenMarketplace, TrackingContract, ETHFaucet

## Educational use cases

- School workshops and after-school Web3 clubs
- Teacher-training tracks (certify educators before they bring Web3 into classrooms)
- Youth coding camps exploring NFTs, tokens, and marketplace mechanics without real-money risk

## Built by

GEMBA IT — https://gembait.com
Parent company: GEMBA EOOD (Varna, Bulgaria)
Contact: contacts@gembait.com
